docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, TANNITH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $127.50 SERVED JUN-06-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, TANNITH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-04-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM - PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MELANIE BETTIS. DEFENDANT TANNITH PATTERSON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: TAMILA IPEMA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATTERSON, TANNITH $2,310.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,360.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR - COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS PROPERLY SERVED. PLAINTIFF HAS MET HER BURDEN OF PROOF. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR FOR THE PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,681.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, TANNITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, TANNITH
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $600.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $45.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, TANNITH
